---
title: "Albion Rrahmani"
description: "Cross-League · Forward · CZE1 → ITA1"
date: "2026-07-18"
categories: [Venezia]
---

```{=html}
<div class="scout-card-container">

  <h3>📊 Transfer Assessment <code>[CROSS-LEAGUE]</code></h3>

  <table>
    <thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Detail</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td><strong>Player</strong></td><td>ALBION RRAHMANI</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Position</strong></td><td>Forward</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Route</strong></td>
        <td><span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.78rem;">CZE1 <span style="color:#4A9EFF;margin:0 0.4rem;">→</span> ITA1</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Season</strong></td><td><em>25/26</em></td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

  <div style="padding:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;padding:0 1.4rem 0.6rem;">
      Per-Metric Percentile (ITA1)
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Progression</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:88%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">88.4%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Scoring</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:87%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">87.4%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Assisting</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:85%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">84.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Passing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:81%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">81.4%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Dribbling</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:80%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">79.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Creativity</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:79%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">79.4%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">ShotAcc</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:76%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">75.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">LongBalls</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:75%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">74.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Pressing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:57%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">57.3%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Crossing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:38%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">37.7%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Heading</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:19%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">19.1%</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="profile-strengths">
    <strong>✦ Strengths ≥ 60th pct</strong>
    Progression (88%) · Scoring (87%) · Assisting (85%) · Passing (81%) · Dribbling (80%) · Creativity (79%) · ShotAcc (76%) · LongBalls (75%)
  </div>
  <div class="profile-neutral">
    <strong>◈ Neutral 40–59th pct</strong>
    Pressing (57%)
  </div>
  <div class="profile-risks">
    <strong>▼ Risks &lt; 40th pct</strong>
    Crossing (38%) · Heading (19%)
  </div>

  <div class="verdict-block">
    <div class="verdict-label">Overall Projection</div>
    <div class="verdict-tier">Reliable Starter</div>
    <div class="verdict-pct">avg pct: 69.7% · Cross-League · CZE1 → ITA1</div>
  </div>

  <div class="card-footnote">
    <span class="card-footnote-marker">*</span>
    <span class="card-footnote-text">
      <strong>Comparison group:</strong> Forwards in ITA1 only &mdash; not other positions or leagues. &middot;
      <strong>Data window:</strong> Player scores are from their most recent season only, not a career average. &middot;
      <strong>Outside scope:</strong> Injury history, tactical system fit, and contract terms are not captured by this model.
    </span>
  </div>

</div>
```
